title: lastrea perpubescens
intro: Lastrea perpubescens, also known as the pubescent lady fern, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the genus Lastrea. It is native to certain parts of Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Lastrea perpubescens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
